# FI0-10615 — Direct Save navigates to progress page

## Background

Currently when the user presses Save and Continue on the `/what-export-journey` page they are navigated to `/check-your-information`. However, all other journeys navigate to the `/progress` page — this should be updated so the behaviour is consistent across journeys.

## User Story

As an exporter

I want to be directed to the progress page when I press Save and Continue on the `/what-export-journey` page of my CC direct landing journey

So that I am directed to the progress page

## Acceptance Criteria

### Scenario 1 — Selecting Save and Continue on What Export Journey

- Given I have navigated to the `/what-export-journey` page of my CC direct landing journey
- When all other sections are Complete or Optional
- And I have populated the mandatory fields
- And I press Save and Continue
- Then I will be directed to the `/progress` page

### Scenario 2 — Selecting Save and Continue on What Export Journey (cloned document)

- Given I have navigated to the `/what-export-journey` page of my CC direct landing journey
- When all other sections are Complete or Optional
- And it is a cloned document
- And I have populated the mandatory fields
- And I press Save and Continue
- Then I will be directed to the `/progress` page

> Notes:
- Provide 90% test coverage only for added code where applicable, non-negotiable
- If and when adding new tests cases, make sure to first look for existing handlers, fixtures that can be reused or adapted to meet the new requirements, rather than creating entirely ones from scratch. This will help maintain consistency and reduce redundancy in our testing suite
- After iteration make sure to clean up any unused handlers, fixtures, test cases or any logic that is not relveant to solving the current problem, to maintain a clean and efficient codebase
